pkmapr 0.3.0

pkmapr: Pakistan Administrative Boundaries Toolkit

pkmapr (pronounced P-K-Mapper) provides a clean, tidy interface to Pakistan’s official administrative boundary data from OCHA/HDX. It downloads and caches geometries at country, province, district, and tehsil level as sf objects compatible with the tidyverse and geospatial ecosystem, and includes utilities for geographic dictionary lookup, spatial measurement, and neighbour structure construction for use with spdep, ggplot2, leaflet, and related packages.

Installation 

# GitHub
remotes::install_github("abdullahumer1101/pkmapr")

# R-Universe
install.packages("pkmapr", repos = "https://abdullahumer1101.r-universe.dev")

Quick start

See Introduction to pkmapr.

Functions

Full documentation for all functions is available in the package reference.

Data source

Boundaries are sourced from the OCHA Pakistan COD-AB, covering country, province, district, and tehsil levels (577 tehsil features). Data are released under CC BY licence.

Citation 

citation("pkmapr")

Or cite directly:

Umer, A. (2025). pkmapr: Pakistan Administrative Boundaries Toolkit. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19769542
